creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> However, I disagree with how you've changed DESCR. Putting the URL
> underneath my name makes it look like that's my URL, which it isn't of
> course. Was there something wrong with my patch to DESCR? 

What i wanted to do was adding WWW: prefix on top of the URL
(see chapter 4.4.2.2.2. of FreeBSD handbook). 

I don't think as you do, but there's possibly someone else who 
thinks so.

It seems the solution makes everyone happy would be as follows:
---
 cards is used. Sounds effects are also built in. 
+
+WWW: http://www4.ncsu.edu/~bwmott/www/oonsoo/
  
 Share and enjoy,
--- 


-- 
KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
           
Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
